summary: Platform Stability RCA VERIFIED: All 6 previously-failing endpoints now return JSON (NOT HTML). 3-layer defense against service worker caching is working: SW kill on boot (index.js), cache-busting headers on apiClient (api.js), cache-busting on raw fetch calls. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: Login + 4 page navigation tests passed with no HTML errors in console.
critical_code_review_comments: 3-layer SW defense properly implemented: Layer 1 (index.js line 11-39), Layer 2 (api.js interceptors), Layer 3 (individual component fetch calls)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform stability issue RESOLVED. All 6 originally failing endpoints verified: /api/calibration/status, /api/intelligence/baseline-snapshot, /api/outlook/status, /api/facts/resolve, /api/lifecycle/state, /api/intelligence/watchtower?status=active. All return application/json content-type, not text/html. 3-layer service worker defense in place. Additional endpoints tested: /api/watchtower/positions, /api/watchtower/findings, /api/boardroom/respond, /api/soundboard/chat, /api/auth/supabase/me, /api/onboarding/status, /api/health.
